raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. บัวปูนปั้น กว้าง 0.10 ม. ลึก 0.10 ม. เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC. Grid callouts along bottom, left to right: 3, 2, 1 (reversed order vs. รูปด้าน1, confirming mirrored back view). Dimension chain: 0.70 | 0.60 | 3.00 | 4.00, bracketed as 1.30 (left overhang, = 0.70+0.60) | 7.00 (grid3-grid1) | 1.30 (right overhang).
description: Rear elevation (รูปด้าน 3), the back/opposite facade from รูปด้าน 1, grid callouts running right-to-left as 3,2,1. Shows a flat fascia band with plaster cornice at top, three window openings (callouts appear to be 1, 2, 2 per the A-08 window schedule), and a wall-reveal detail (เซาะร่อง/PVC strip). Same overall building height datum as other elevations (±0.00 to +0.60 to +3.75).
warnings: PATTERN RECLASSIFIED (t4, 2026-07-08 taxonomy): t3 classified this view as 'unknown' → now 'side_profile' (#8), same reasoning as the หน้า07 elevations.

GRID-RELEVANT: this sheet's left-side overhang breakdown (0.70 then 0.60, reading right-to-left toward grid 3) is the mirror image of รูปด้าน1's right-side breakdown (0.60 then 0.70) — same two numbers, same 1.30 total, just read in opposite order because this elevation runs 3-2-1 instead of 1-2-3. Confirms (does not newly discover) the roof-overhang-vs-wall-extension distinction already flagged in หน้า07_elevation1.json.
This page (A-06) contains two elevations; รูปด้าน 4 is in sibling file _หน้า08_elevation4.json.
Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t3's หน้า08_elevation3.json — same content, no disagreement.
